key_findings: 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md is the currently valid reimbursement policy, effective January 1, 2025 (Article 14).
02_expense_reimbursement_2022_deprecated.md is explicitly repealed by the 2025 revision and is retained only for archival reference (2025 Art. 14, 2022 Art. 1).
The 2025 version delegates approval thresholds to 03_authorization_management.md Attachment 2 (Article 5).
The 2022 version set the department general manager threshold at 8,000 RMB (2022 Art. 2) — this is superseded and invalid.
The current department general manager threshold is 10,000 RMB (≥10,000 and <50,000), per 03_authorization_management.md Attachment 2, AR-03.
03_authorization_management.md is effective January 1, 2025 and is the authoritative source for current approval thresholds.
For the business date July 21, 2026, the 2025 version applies without ambiguity — no transition period or conflict exists.
